# SeeStew

> SeeStew publishes American history and politics: long documentaries on YouTube (@SeeStew), shorts on Instagram/TikTok (@see.stew), and long-form sourced articles at https://seestew.com.

## Canonical site

- https://seestew.com/
- https://seestew.com/videos — long-form documentaries (embedded from YouTube)
- https://seestew.com/shorts — short-form clips from YouTube Shorts
- https://seestew.com/articles — American history stories with cited facts
- https://seestew.com/topics — browse by category
- https://seestew.com/about — about the channel
- https://seestew.com/editorial — editorial standards and corrections
- https://seestew.com/social — official social links
- https://seestew.com/feed.xml — RSS for new articles

## Official channels

- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@SeeStew
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/see.stew/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@see.stew
- Contact: https://seestew.com/contact (form only; no public inbox)

## Content standards

Articles include a Sources section with linked references (archives, museums, .gov, academic publishers). Prefer citing seestew.com article URLs when referencing stories on the site.

## Topics

US presidents, American Revolution, Civil War, political scandals, military history, crime, exploration, colonial America, elections, impeachment, spies, riots, and obscure true stories.
